name: capstan
description: An AI Agent Native full-stack framework for building agent-operable software.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-core && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-router && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-db && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-auth && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-ai && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-cron && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-agent && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-react && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-dev && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-cli && npm run build --workspace create-capstan-app
